body: import org.junit.Test;

translation: assert str(e.value) == "Invalid octet in encoded value: -59"
self.assertEqual(str(e), "Input length exceeds maximum size for encoded data: 2147483639")

assert str(e.value) == "Invalid octet in encoded value: 71"
